name: Voice Agent Tool - Business Info FAQ

nodes.name: Respond - Return Availability to Voice Agent

additionalFields.description: =Booked via AI voice receptionist. Phone: {{ $('Code - Parse Booking Request').item.json.customer_phone }}
additionalFields.summary:
="=Appointment - {{ $('Code - Parse Booking Request').item.json.name }}"
"=Booked via AI voice receptionist. Phone: {{ $('Code - Parse Booking Request').item.json.phone }}"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ results: [{ toolCallId: $('Code - Format Success Response').item.json.toolCallId, result: $('Code - Format Success Response').item.json.result }] }) }}

value.Name: ={{ $json.name }}
value.End time: ={{ (() => { const [h, m] = $json.time.split(':').map(Number); let endM = m + ($json.durationMinutes || 30); let endH = h + Math.floor(endM / 60); endM = endM % 60; return `${String(endH).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(endM).padStart(2,'0')}` })() }}
